title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 158.59 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD — pair holds at 1.1772.

title: AUD/USD
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.7169.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: JPY no longer acting as safe haven, USD/JPY correlation with VIX at +0.672, z=+1.36σ.
